rationale: The candidate 3ddd87dbf91869630430accd130a79a6b4d8d051 is the only one that provides a complete translation. The 'current' version and the other candidate both have a major bug where the explanation for Challenge 1 is missing/truncated. This candidate uses high-quality technical French and correctly preserves all MDX components. Note: The suggestion in the previous judge report regarding the link was already correctly implemented in this candidate's text (it uses '(/challenges/)'), so no further fixes are required.
